original_image_tags: Typed document, page 2 of Bureau Bulletin No. 42, Series 1947. The paper is aged and yellowed, with visible staple holes and tape marks on the left margin.

elements.description: Page contains typed text on two sheets of paper. Includes a heading '(B) FLYING DISCS --', the date '7-30-47', and 'BUREAU BULLETIN NO. 42 Series 1947'. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts are present. Contains some handwritten annotations, a vertical stamp 'ORIGINAL COPY FILED', and a stamped date 'AUG 18 1947' with a number '58'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains no actual visual content like photographs or sketches, consisting only of typed text and document markings.
